evals.prompt: Run the whole pipeline end to end and confirm it works. One stage timed out last time.
evals.expected_output: Pipeline run completed; the timed-out stage diagnosed as a slow-but-valid call, its timeout raised, re-run proven green, artifacts validated, and a clear pass/fail report grounded in actual output.
expectations: Reads the relevant stage source before changing the timeout
Distinguishes a transient error from a systematic timeout and fixes the root cause rather than retrying blindly
Re-runs after the fix to prove it, instead of declaring success on the errored run
Validates produced artifacts against their spec before reporting done

evals.prompt: The pipeline run finished without errors — are the generated output files actually valid?
evals.expected_output: Each artifact is opened and checked against its schema/template; missing fields or placeholders are flagged rather than assuming exit-0 means correct.
expectations: Treats a clean exit as necessary but not sufficient
Checks artifact contents against the expected shape/spec, not just their existence

evals.prompt: We just got a clean end-to-end run. Wrap it up.
evals.expected_output: Stale output folders and temp files removed, and docs/dashboard refreshed to match the new state, with an evidence-grounded summary.
expectations: Removes stale or partial outputs from prior runs
Syncs docs/dashboards so they don't drift from the run's reality
